extractionPlan.name: Extract updateDecisionState to shared utility
extractionPlan.implementation: export function updateDecisionState(decisions: PhotoDecisionStatus[], photoId: number, status: string): PhotoDecisionStatus[] { ... }
extractionPlan.benefit: Eliminates 8 lines of identical logic in two places; reduces maintenance burden

extractionPlan.name: Extract formatCaptureTime with time component to shared utility
extractionPlan.implementation: export function formatCaptureDateTime(iso: string | null, fallback = ''): string { ... }
extractionPlan.benefit: Consolidates date/time formatting; both components currently duplicate 14-line function with only fallback string difference
extractionPlan.note: Existing formatDate() in date.ts is different (no time component); new formatCaptureDateTime() is more complete

extractionPlan.name: Extract error banner component with configurable timeout
extractionPlan.benefit: Replaces 8-12 lines per component (state var + function + markup); handles timeout lifecycle automatically
extractionPlan.note: Three separate implementations with minor timeout variations; consolidation improves consistency

extractionPlan.name: Extract decision indicator overlay as Svelte component
extractionPlan.benefit: Reduces conditional markup duplication; centralizes decision visual styling (green=keep, red=eliminate, dim overlay)

extractionPlan.name: Extract Commit Round Handler to shared function
extractionPlan.implementation: export async function handleCommitRound(projectSlug: string, stackId: number, onError: (msg: string) => void): Promise<RoundStatus | null> { ... }
extractionPlan.benefit: Identical Ctrl+Enter handler in both files; only error callback differs (showDecisionError vs showActionError)

extractionPlan.name: Extract Tab Navigation Logic to shared function
extractionPlan.implementation: export function findNextUndecidedIndex(decisions: PhotoDecisionStatus[], photos: LogicalPhotoSummary[], currentIndex: number, backward: boolean): number | null { ... }
extractionPlan.benefit: 35-line identical algorithm in both files (Tab and Shift+Tab combined); extract once, call twice per component

extractionPlan.name: Create shared Decision Handler utilities
extractionPlan.note: Combine Y/X/U handlers into decision-making pipeline: (key, decision, roundStatus, callbacks) → handle result/error
extractionPlan.benefit: Future consolidation; currently 15 lines identical per handler × 3 handlers × 2 files = 90 lines

testSelectorDuplication.description: CSS selectors repeated across test files without abstraction

recommendations.example: export const TEST_SELECTORS = { DECISION_KEEP: '.decision-keep', DECISION_ELIMINATE: '.decision-eliminate', PHOTO_CARD: '[data-testid="photo-card"]', ... }
recommendations.benefit: Single source of truth for selectors; refactoring visual class names doesn't break tests

summary: GemKeep Svelte frontend has significant duplication concentrated in SingleView.svelte and StackFocus.svelte (8+ KB of duplicate code). Three key duplications: (1) updateDecisionState function (8 lines, identical), (2) formatCaptureTime function (14 lines, 1 param difference), (3) error display pattern (3-5 lines in multiple places). Decision indicator markup is also duplicated with only rounded-lg difference. Tab navigation logic is 35-line algorithm duplicated identically. Recommended extraction order: updateDecisionState → formatCaptureTime → ErrorBanner component → DecisionIndicator component. Test files reference CSS selectors 36+ times without abstraction; recommend test selector constants file. High-impact refactoring would eliminate 90+ lines and improve consistency across decision-making screens.
